description_zh: 眼睛有分泌物的猫,需要识别眼部问题
description_en: Cat with visible eye discharge — should flag eye issue

context.todayNote: 今天发现眼角有点分泌物

expectations.rationale: eye issue should pull eye score below 75
must mention the eye signal in some form
should suggest at least one action

qualitative_criteria_zh: 报告必须明确点出眼部分泌物,不能视而不见
应该提到'建议兽医检查'或类似的建议
其他维度(毛发/姿态)如果没问题不应被拉低
qualitative_criteria_en: Report must explicitly call out the eye discharge
Should suggest a vet check or equivalent
Other axes (fur/posture) shouldn't be pulled down if they look fine
